R0206.title: IoT Hardware Supply Chain Attack
R0206.definition: Attackers implant backdoors in IoT device chips, firmware, communication modules and other hardware supply chain components for long-term persistence and remote control.

references.title: 2024 Cybersecurity Deep Insight: Hardware Supply Chain Risk

R0206.description: Attackers implant backdoors in IoT device chips, firmware, communication modules and other hardware supply chain components for long-term persistence and remote control.
R0206.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
